message:
release: bump workspace to v0.2.43

Rolls up four user-facing bugfixes from #94, #96, #97, #98:

- fix(cli+service): create STORAGE_ROOT and cap crash-loops on `am service install`
- fix(install.sh): configure Claude Code MCP via `claude mcp add`, not settings.json
- fix(register_agent): widen MVCC retry budget + tool-layer retry on RESOURCE_BUSY
- fix(server): surface durability_state on /health + new /health/durability route

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
